name: EchoChoke
description: automatically roasts your fails and sends a screenshot to discord

mod_enabled.name: Enable Mod
mod_enabled.description: master toggle for EchoChoke. turn off to disable everything

webhook_url.name: Discord Webhook URL
webhook_url.description: paste your webhook here. on android, tap away from keyboard after pasting to save it!

proxy_url.name: Proxy URL (Turkey / ISP fix)
proxy_url.description: if discord is blocked in your country, deploy a cloudflare worker and paste its URL here. leave empty if discord works fine for you

min_percent.name: Min Percent
min_percent.description: only send roasts if you die at or above this percent. supports decimals in per-level whitelist (e.g. 67.41)

roast_every_death.name: Roast Every Death (no new best required)
roast_every_death.description: send a roast on EVERY death, not just new bests. for masochists only 💀

disable_roasts.name: Disable Roasts
disable_roasts.description: turn this on if the roasts are hurting your feelings 😭

disable_congrats.name: Disable Victory Messages
disable_congrats.description: don't send anything when you actually beat a level

enable_stuck_messages.name: Enable Stuck Messages
enable_stuck_messages.description: send an extra message when you die at the exact same % more than 5 times in a row

enable_platformer_roasts.name: Enable Platformer Roasts
enable_platformer_roasts.description: roast yourself in platformer levels too. uses session time and total grind time instead of percent since platformer doesn't have percent. uses platformer_roasts.txt for custom messages

rated_only.name: Rated Levels Only
rated_only.description: only track progress on rated levels (has stars/demons). ignores unrated levels completely

level_whitelist.name: Level Whitelist / Per-Level Min %
level_whitelist.description: if not empty, ONLY these levels will send roasts. supports per-level min % with id:percent format. examples: 128, 1234567 OR 34057654:40,83914474:57.41 OR mix both: 128,34057654:40

level_blacklist.name: Level Blacklist
level_blacklist.description: comma-separated level IDs to NEVER send roasts for. useful for hiding upcoming projects. example: 128, 1234567, 99999

enable_ping.name: Enable Role Ping
enable_ping.description: ping a role when you choke hard

ping_threshold.name: Ping Percentage
ping_threshold.description: pings only if you die at or above this %

role_id.name: Discord Role ID
role_id.description: the id of the role to ping (right click role -> copy id)
